'''sanaza''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:wymote|wymote]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-n-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wymote|wymote]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| sanaza
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:sænæzæth|sænæzæth]] || [[word:sænæzæj|sænæzæj]] || [[word:sænæzæsh|sænæzæsh]] || [[word:sænæzæ|sænæzæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:sananazath|sananazath]] || [[word:sananazaj|sananazaj]] || [[word:sananazash|sananazash]] || [[word:sananaza|sananaza]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:sanazath|sanazath]] || [[word:sanazaj|sanazaj]] || [[word:sanazash|sanazash]] || [[word:sanaza|sanaza]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:sanafzath|sanafzath]] || [[word:sanafzaj|sanafzaj]] || [[word:sanafzash|sanafzash]] || [[word:sanafzaf|sanafzaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:sanazatha|sanazatha]] || [[word:sanazaja|sanazaja]] || [[word:sanazasha|sanazasha]] || [[word:sanazaka|sanazaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:sanazath|sanazath]] || [[word:sanazaj|sanazaj]] || [[word:sanazash|sanazash]] || [[word:sanaza|sanaza]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:sanazathal|sanazathal]] || [[word:sanazajal|sanazajal]] || [[word:sanazashal|sanazashal]] || [[word:sanazakal|sanazakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:sanazathatha|sanazathatha]] || [[word:sanazajaja|sanazajaja]] || [[word:sanazashasha|sanazashasha]] || [[word:sanazaka|sanazaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:sanazathan|sanazathan]] || [[word:sanazajan|sanazajan]] || [[word:sanazashan|sanazashan]] || [[word:sanazakan|sanazakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:sanazathaoro|sanazathaoro]] || [[word:sanazajaoro|sanazajaoro]] || [[word:sanazashaoro|sanazashaoro]] || [[word:sanazakaoro|sanazakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4a6dc77}}
